name: Debian 12+ systemd-stub UKI baseline
description: Debian's systemd-stub-based UKIs (Debian 12 bookworm-backports, Debian 13 trixie) emit key=value EV_IPL events on PCR 12 declaring `kernel_name' prefixed with `Debian GNU/Linux' or `linux-image-'. Debian ships the upstream kernel with CONFIG_SECURITY_LOCKDOWN_LSM=y but the default level in Secure-Boot mode is `integrity', not `confidentiality' — so tier-3 evidence will say lockdown-confidentiality=false here unless the admin overrides via cmdline.
pcr-extension-order: pcr-12: EV_IPL key=value for each systemd-stub parameter
notes: Debian's ukify-produced UKIs are signed with Debian's Secure Boot signing key which chains to Microsoft's UEFI CA via shim. Per-UKI hashes should be contributed upstream to this DB as they appear in `apt' repos. lockdown=confidentiality requires explicit cmdline override; default is `integrity'.
